title: hieracium hypopitys
intro: Hieracium hypopitys, also known as False Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Hieracium hypopitys can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes.
